items.action: Acquire a structured database of total payroll elements, segregated strictly by Gender (Male/Female) and Nationality (Saudi/Expatriate).
Verify that gross metrics encompass basic wages, structural bonuses, overtime pools, housing/transport stipends, and GOSI facility contributions.
Reconcile the accrued employee end-of-service provision vector formed within the current reporting cycle.
Acquire a formal signed statement verifying that all registered personnel are documented in full accordance with KSA labor laws.
Determine and apply sample filters: select at random the lesser of 40 individual files or 20% of the total localized human resource cost base.
For all selected personnel files, confirm authentic government credentials.
Trace payroll distributions for the selected sample directly to institutional bank output files to confirm absolute execution.
Examine current physical or electronic employment documentation to verify direct active status during the reporting cycle.
Audit human resource logs to confirm zero intermingling of external sub-contractors or third-party manpower within Section 3.
Verify that health insurance premiums (Sec 4) or educational/training overheads (Sec 6) are systematically purged from workforce entries.
Acquire a comprehensive vendor ledger of all expenditures incurred across supply chains, structured in descending order of cost.
Isolate any cost element lacking explicit granular transaction backing and classify directly as a non-permissible unclassified cost.
Verify that explicit exclusions (Capex, Depreciation, Zakat, Taxes, Customs, Provisions, Foreign hub cost) are fully extracted from the operational baseline.
Confirm that the declared list covers at least 70% of total supply chain outlays, or captures the top 40 unique suppliers systematically.
If unmapped residual spend remains equal to or above 500 Million SAR, expand the tracking matrix down to 80 suppliers or until residual drops below 500M.
For every declared domestic vendor entity, pull the single largest historical invoice along with one purely randomized voucher line.
Cross-examine sampled lines against underlying foundational commercial evidence blocks.
Validate every specific claimed vendor local content score directly against the live digital authentication portal maintained by LCGPA.
Where regional distribution agents or intermediate brokers are utilized, track compliance with LCGPA intermediary guidelines.
items.document: Trace score to the root factory source

items.action: If outlays on pure physical goods represent less than 50% of the cost base, confirm the inclusion of up to 300 suppliers in Section 4.1.
Verify if gross annual capital additions exceed the 100M SAR benchmark to activate full compliance mapping protocols.
Exclude real estate purchases, bare land acquisitions, inventory stores, and asset transfers between associated global corporate units.
Map out the top 80 unique capital assets in descending cost order or until unmapped capex equals zero.
Confirm that all educational outlays and training entries are tied exclusively to the development of Saudi citizens.
Audit internal on-the-job instructional logs. Ensure calculations match verifiable recorded training hours.
items.document: Hourly cost rates trace to actuals

items.action: Examine direct tech-transfers or investments made to enhance KSA SMEs. Exclude contractually mandated maintenance setup.
Verify that declared Research & Development outlays conform directly with IFRS capitalization constraints.
items.document: Expense mapping match to income statement

items.action: Acquire the complete master corporate Fixed Asset Register. Match baseline amounts to the audited financial ledger.
Verify that all assets classified as buildings or structural land improvements are assigned a domestic manufacturing index.
For all non-building asset pools, test origin paperwork to separate domestic manufacturing from foreign cross-border imports.
For industrial entities, verify mandatory listing of sales for the top 10 unique commercial buyers in KSA.
Verify total export transactions against the general ledger. Check that end-users reside completely outside KSA borders.
Verify that declared dividend distributions match financial statements and are split by Saudi and foreign shareholding blocks.
Acquire a copy of the official Management Representation Letter, printed on corporate letterhead, signed by the CEO, and stamped.
Confirm completion and signature of the compliance declaration by the lead registered partner.
